summary: Integrated ADR 0327 onto the exact-main tree by keeping `ws-0327-live-apply` active as `live_applied` until the next numbered release cut, regenerating `workstreams.yaml`, `README.md`, `changelog.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the coordination diagram from the final workstream canonical truth, and recording the mainline discovery receipt while the current realistic repo version remains `0.178.3` because unrelated waiver blockers still prevent a fresh release cut.

verification.observed: The rebased branch-local receipt already proved ADR 0327 end to end through focused tests, `generate_discovery_artifacts --check`, `validate_repo.sh agent-standards generated-docs`, `make remote-validate`, and `make pre-push-gate`, preserved in `receipts/live-applies/2026-04-03-adr-0327-sectional-agent-discovery-live-apply.json`.

`python3 scripts/workstream_registry.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --write`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, and `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --write` refreshed the generated workstream compatibility view, the `Unreleased` changelog entry, the README receipt table, `versions/stack.yaml`, and the coordination diagram from final workstream metadata.

verification.check: Remote validation and push gate on the exact-main tree
verification.observed: `make remote-validate` and the final receipt-bearing `make pre-push-gate` both passed on the rebased exact-main tree, with the latter covering `documentation-index`, `yaml-lint`, `generated-docs`, `generated-portals`, `ansible-syntax`, `ansible-lint`, `semgrep-sast`, `security-scan`, and `integration-tests`.

`git diff --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces generated-docs` all passed on the final exact-main tree after the branch-local and mainline receipts were written.

`LV3_SKIP_OUTLINE_SYNC=1 uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/release_manager.py status --json` still reports repository version `0.178.3`, platform version `0.130.98`, and a blocked release cut because three open `controller_dependency_gap` waiver receipts remain active through `2026-04-06`; ADR 0327 therefore merges as exact-main truth but remains unreleased.

notes: This mainline receipt captures the exact-main integration state before any later numbered release promotes ADR 0327 into a new `VERSION`.

Because `included_in_repo_version` is still `null`, `ws-0327-live-apply` stays under `workstreams/active/` as a terminal `live_applied` workstream until the next release cut stamps the first repo version that contains this ADR.
The current realistic repo version remains `0.178.3`; no new release surfaces were cut in this workstream because the global release manager is blocked by unrelated open waiver receipts.
